project_type: Vue 3 + TypeScript multi-app frontend (admin + portal + shared library)
build_system: Vite with vue-tsc type-checking; each app has its own package.json
test_framework: Vitest with happy-dom environment, @vue/test-utils, fast-check for property tests
build_command: cd panel/web/admin && npm run build; cd panel/web/portal && npm run build
test_command: cd panel/web/admin && npx vitest run; cd panel/web/shared && npx vitest run
verification_instructions: 1) Run vitest in admin and shared directories to confirm tests pass. 2) Run vue-tsc --noEmit in admin and portal to check type safety.
setup_instructions: cd panel/web/shared && npm install; cd panel/web/admin && npm install; cd panel/web/portal && npm install
environment_constraints: Node >= 18 required. No node_modules currently installed. Network needed for npm install.
contribution_requirements: Follow DESIGN_SYSTEM.md conventions. Use @koris/ui, @koris/composables, @koris/types aliases. Keep shared code in shared/, app-specific in respective src/ dirs.
key_patterns: Path aliases: @koris/ui -> shared/components, @koris/composables -> shared/composables, @koris/types -> shared/types, @koris/styles -> shared/styles. Stores use Pinia defineStore with useApi composable. Views are lazy-loaded via router. Composables follow Vue 3 composition API patterns.
directory_structure: panel/web/admin/ - Admin dashboard SPA (Vite + Vue 3 + Pinia). panel/web/portal/ - Customer portal SPA. panel/web/shared/ - Shared component library (@koris/ui), composables (@koris/composables), types (@koris/types), styles (@koris/styles). Both apps use path aliases to reference shared.
